'''AZ 7-81''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] present at the [[Azzameen family]]'s [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Home Base]] alongside [[AZ 7-62]] as [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] left the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] to inspect three compromised [[Azzameen cargo fields|family cargo areas]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
